case_title: R. E. NEWMAN VS. THOMAS PHOUMARA et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (NO AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS LISTED. FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWMAN, R. E. AS TO DEFENDANT INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWMAN, R. E. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWMAN, R. E. AS TO DEFENDANT NOBLER-MAGDAEL, ASHTON GREAGOR
APPICATION FOR ORDER TO VACATE PREFILING ORDER AND REMOVE PLAINTIFF/PETITIONER FROM JUDICIAL COUNCIL VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
ORDER TO FILE NEW LITIGATION BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL THREE DEFENDANTS TO OCT-07-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INFINITY INS. CO. WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANTS THOMAS PHOUMARA AND ASHTON G. NOBLER-MAGDAEL WHO WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEWMAN, R. E. AS TO DEFENDANT PHOUMARA, THOMAS NOBLER-MAGDAEL, ASHTON GREAGOR INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWMAN, R. E. AS TO DEFENDANT PHOUMARA, THOMAS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL THREE DEFENDANTS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT INFINITY INS. CO., EXCEPT DEFENDANTS THOMAS PHOUMARA AND ASHTON NOBLER-MAGDEL WHO WERE NOT PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM CAVANAUGH--MATERIAL DAMAGE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
